name: @bananapus/deploy-all-v6
description: One-shot deployment orchestrator for the Juicebox V6 ecosystem.

scripts.deploy:propose:testnets: DEFIFA_REV_START_TIME=$(($(date +%s) + 604800)) npx sphinx propose script/Deploy.s.sol --networks testnets
scripts.deploy:propose:mainnets: DEFIFA_REV_START_TIME=$(($(date +%s) + 604800)) npx sphinx propose script/Deploy.s.sol --networks mainnets
scripts.deploy:propose:lp-split-hook-fix:testnet: npx sphinx propose script/DeployLpSplitHookFix.s.sol --target-contract DeployLpSplitHookFix --networks testnets
scripts.deploy:propose:lp-split-hook-fix:mainnet: npx sphinx propose script/DeployLpSplitHookFix.s.sol --target-contract DeployLpSplitHookFix --networks mainnets
scripts.deploy:propose:banny-drop1:testnets: npx sphinx propose script/DeployBannyDrops.s.sol --target-contract DeployBannyDrop1 --networks testnets
scripts.deploy:propose:banny-drop1:mainnets: npx sphinx propose script/DeployBannyDrops.s.sol --target-contract DeployBannyDrop1 --networks mainnets
scripts.deploy:propose:banny-drop2:testnets: npx sphinx propose script/DeployBannyDrops.s.sol --target-contract DeployBannyDrop2 --networks testnets
scripts.deploy:propose:banny-drop2:mainnets: npx sphinx propose script/DeployBannyDrops.s.sol --target-contract DeployBannyDrop2 --networks mainnets
scripts.deploy:propose:twap-oracle-upgrade:testn: npm run -s deploy:preflight:twap-oracle-upgrade:testnets && npx sphinx propose script/DeployTwapOracleUpgrade.s.sol --target-contract DeployTwapOracleUpgrade --networks testnets
scripts.deploy:propose:twap-oracle-upgrade:mainn: npm run -s deploy:preflight:twap-oracle-upgrade:mainnets && npx sphinx propose script/DeployTwapOracleUpgrade.s.sol --target-contract DeployTwapOracleUpgrade --networks mainnets
